en.extract:
The mountain leaf warbler (Phylloscopus trivirgatus) is a songbird species from the leaf warbler family (Phylloscopidae). It was formerly included in the "Old World warbler" assemblage.
It is found in Indonesia and Malaysia. Its natural habitats are subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest and subtropical or tropical moist montane forest.

The '''mountain leaf warbler''' ('''''Phylloscopus trivirgatus''''') is a [[songbird]] [[species]] from the leaf warbler [[Family (taxonomy)|family]] ([[Phylloscopidae]]). It was formerly included in the "[[Old World warbler]]" assemblage.

It is found in [[Indonesia]] and [[Malaysia]]. Its natural [[habitat]]s are [[subtropical or tropical moist lowland forest]] and subtropical or tropical moist [[montane forest]].
